name: get_directions
description: Calculate a route between two or more waypoints. Returns the full route geometry, step-by-step directions, total distance, and estimated duration. Supports multiple transport profiles: driving-car, driving-hgv (heavy goods vehicle), cycling-regular, cycling-mountain, foot-walking, foot-hiking, and wheelchair. You can also request alternative routes and avoid specific road types (highways, tolls, ferries).

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: The transport mode. Path parameter. Options: driving-car, driving-hgv, cycling-regular, cycling-mountain, cycling-electric, foot-walking, foot-hiking, wheelchair.

parameters.name: coordinates
parameters.description: Array of [longitude, latitude] coordinate pairs defining the route waypoints. Minimum 2 points (origin and destination).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language for route instructions. Default is 'en'. Supports: en, de, fr, es, it, pt, nl, etc.

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Unit system for distances. Options: m (meters, default), km, mi (miles).

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.description: Whether to include the route geometry in the response. Default is true.

parameters.name: alternative_routes
parameters.description: Object with 'target_count' (number of alternatives, max 3) to request alternative routes.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Advanced options object. Use 'avoid_features' array to avoid: highways, tollways, ferries, fords, steps.
